view.title: Bona VPS {id}
view.emailSentMessage: Imeile ea kamohelo e rometse hape. Sheba lehokong la hau.
view.reinstallNote: U ka nkela sebaka ho tsoa lenaneo la la nngele
view.cpanelNote: Pane ea taolo e tlameha ho kengoa ho OS e tlhophileng ntle le liphetoho. Haeba ho na le data e tla latlheheloa.
view.resendWelcomeEmailConfirm: Na u u-bua nnete ha u batla ho romela hape imeile ea amohela?

order.title: Oda VPS
order.tosAgree: Ke bale maemo a ka holimo 'me ke a lumela.
order.rootPasswordNote: Tlhokomeliso: Password e tlameha ho ba le bonyane litlhaku tse 8, setlhaku se le seng se potlakileng, se phahameng, nomoro le senatagare.
order.subscriptionRenewal: Khopolo e tla iphetola hape kamora {period} ka {cost} ho fihlela e a hlakolloa.
order.tosAcknowledgment: Ka ho shaya lebokose lena, u lumela hore u reka sehlahisoa sa khopolo se iphetolang ka bo-eona mme se lefuoe ho khathe ea hao ea kiriti. Haeba u batla ho hlakola khopolo, u ka kenella portaleng ea bareki. Khetha tshebeletso e teng mme u tobetse Hlakola kapa u romele imeile ho: billing{'@'}interserver.net.

changeHostname.title: Fetola Lebitso la VPS
changeHostname.existingHostname: Lebitso la Haolo le Leng Teng

changeRootPassword.title: Fetola Password ea Root ea VPS
changeRootPassword.passwordMismatch: Password le Tiiso ea Password ha di tshwane

reinstallOs.title: Beha Hape OS
reinstallOs.importantNote1: Ho beha hape sisteme ea tshebetso ho tla phimola data yohle.
reinstallOs.importantNote2: Pele o beha hape sisteme ea tshebetso, ka kopo nka backup.
reinstallOs.confirmReinstall: Ke batla ho nkela sebaka OS!

buyIp.title: Sekelelo sa IP se Eketsehileng bakeng sa VPS ea hao
buyIp.existingAddonIps: Liaterese tsa IP tse Eketsehileng tse Teng

buyHdSpace.title: Sebaka se Eketsehileng sa Disiki ea VPS
buyHdSpace.spaceNote: Se ka rekuoa bonyane 1 ho fihlela 100GB sebaka se eketsehileng sa HD

changeTimezone.title: Fetola Nako ea Sebaka sa {module}
changeTimezone.importantNote1: U tlameha ho ntsha {module} ea hao ka botlalo pele u fetola nako ea sebaka.
changeTimezone.importantNote2: VPS e tla ntshoa mme e qalisohe hape nakong ea tsœbétsœbé.
changeTimezone.importantNote3: Nako ea sebaka leqepheng lena e tla lula e le America/New_York ho sa natsoe peakanyo ea seva ea hao.

changeWebuzoPassword.title: Fetola Password ea Molaoli oa Webuzo
changeWebuzoPassword.portalLoginPassword: Password ea Kena Portal ea Rona
changeWebuzoPassword.passwordMismatch: Password le Netefatso ha li lumellane

resetPassword.title: Seta Hape Password ea VPS
resetPassword.windowsWarning: Ho seta hape password ea Windows ho tla baka ho khutlisa ho sa hlophiseheng. Hlokomela hore ha ho update e tsamayang VNC. Haeba ho na le update e tsamayang VNC e tla bontsha: Windows e sa kenyelletsa lintlafatso, u se ke ua khutlisa.
resetPassword.confirmReset: Ke batla ho Seta Hape Password!

reverseDns.title: DNS ea Morao
reverseDns.dnsChangeNote: Liphetoho ho DNS ea morao li nka ho fihlela hora e le 'ngoe ho hlaha.

vnc.remoteDesktopDescription: Ho fumaneha feela ho Sethala sa Windows. Desktop e hole ke tsela e bonolo ea ho hokahana le desktop ea sesebelisoa sa marang-rang.
vnc.remoteDesktopStep1: Password ea Molaoli e tlameha ho behoa ho VPS pele u sebelisa desktop e hole.
vnc.remoteDesktopStep2: Hokahana ka VNC kapa HTML5 VNC ho beha password ea hao ea pele.
vnc.remoteDesktopNote: Bakeng sa tlhahiso ea desktop e hole tobetsa
vnc.desktopVncDescription: VNC e u lumella ho hokahana le desktop ea sesebelisoa sa marang-rang. VNC e ka sebetsa ho sefofane sa inthanete kapa e le khakhane ea ikemisetsang.
vnc.grantIpAccess: Fa IP ea hao tokelo ea ho fihlella VNC
vnc.grantIpWait: Kopa u linde metsotso e 2 bakeng sa tsœbétsœbé ho phethoa.
vnc.vncClientNote: U ka latela le e 'ngoe ea likhakhane tse ngata tsa VNC tse fumanehang ho inthanete. Re khothalletsa TightVNC.
vnc.connectHtml5: Ho hokahana ka HTML5 VNC Client:
vnc.connectOldLayout: Ho hokahana ka moqoqo oa khale:
vnc.html5Note: HTML5 VNC client e sebetsa hantle ho sefofane sefe kapa sefe sa sejoale-joale ho kenyelletsa lisefofane tsa mobile (iOS le Android).

setupVnc.title: Beha VNC
setupVnc.ipToGrant: IP ea ho fa tokelo ea VNC
setupVnc.grantAccess: Fa VNC e Fumane ho IP

insertCd.insertIso: Kenyelletsa Setshwantsho sa ISO ho CDROM Drive
insertCd.urlPlaceholder: Kenya URL ea ISO ea CD kapa DVD

backup.backupsPartitionNote: Likopi tsa tshireletso li tla sebetsa feela ka karolelano ea kamehla.
backup.currentBackups: Likopi tsa Tshireletso tsa Hona Joale
backup.confirmBackup: Na u u-bua nnete ha u batla ho etsa kopi ea tshireletso?
backup.noBackup: Hona joale ha ho kopi ea tshireletso

backups.title: Laola Likopi tsa Tshireletso tsa VPS

restore.offlineNote: Seva ea hao e tla ba offline ha e nkela sebaka difaele tsohle tsa hona joale ka tse ho kopi ea tshireletso. Ikopanye le tsheheletso bakeng sa lipotso.
restore.loginPasswordLabel: Kenya Password ea Kena ho Netefatsa Busa.
restore.confirmRestore: Na u u-bua nnete ha u batla ho busa kopi ena ea tshireletso?

trafficUsage.title: Tshebediso ea Bandwidth / Mochini oa Sephethephethe
trafficUsage.billingNote: Sena ha se sebelisoe bakeng sa lipalo tsa tefiso mme ke kalo feela e itshetlehileng ho likhathate tsa hao tsa marang-rang.

slices.title: Ntsâ Maemo / Fokotsa Likaroloana
slices.slicesNote: Ho fihlela likaroloana tse 32 li ka kengoa VPS.
slices.proratedNote: Pallelo e lekaneng e lefuoang hona joale.
slices.recurringBillNote: Invoise e phindaphindoang e tla fetola kakaretso eo
slices.newInvoiceNote: Liinvoise tse ncha li tla ba theko eo
slices.confirmLabel: Ee ke rata ho etsa sena.
